allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Services: redesign to outcome-first always-visible grid

- Replace hover-to-expand accordion with simple 4-column grid
- Lead with benefit statements \("Get clear answers..."\) not service names
- Remove heavy section header, add subtle "Here 's how we help" bridge
- Convert to server component \(remove useState, reduce JS bundle\)
- Tighten spacing for seamless hero-to-services flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Hero: add yellow highlight and justify both headline lines

- Add yellow highlighter backdrop to Line 1 \(EMPOWERING EVERY CHILD''S\)
- Convert Line 2 to justified individual letters for pixel-perfect alignment
- Adjust max-width \(540px → 580px\) and fine-tune font sizes
- Both lines now start and end at exact same horizontal points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
